series_metadata.series_description: Informal and invalid complaints are submitted by public employees (PE), public employee representatives or the general public regarding workplace safety and health concerns. Examples of these complaints would be no jurisdiction of right of entry or required action by employer. Invalid Complaints are issues not applicable to Public Employment Risk Reduction Program (PERRP) standards.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until scanned and is deemed readable, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in database for 3 years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
